# NextMetro — llms.txt
# https://nextmetro.live

> NextMetro is a real-time tracker for the Washington D.C. Metrorail system.
> It provides live train arrival times, service alerts, elevator/escalator
> status, and fare calculations for all 98 WMATA stations across 6 lines.

## Main Pages

- [Homepage](https://nextmetro.live/): Real-time station search and train arrivals
- [Service Alerts](https://nextmetro.live/alerts/): Live DC Metro delays, incidents, and elevator outages
- [Elevator & Escalator Status](https://nextmetro.live/elevators/): Current outage reports
- [Fare Calculator](https://nextmetro.live/fares/): Peak and off-peak fare lookup between stations
- [About](https://nextmetro.live/about.html): About the project and its author
- [Crisis Resources](https://nextmetro.live/crisis/): Mental health and crisis support resources

## Metro Line Pages

- [Red Line](https://nextmetro.live/lines/red/): Shady Grove to Glenmont — 27 stations
- [Blue Line](https://nextmetro.live/lines/blue/): Franconia-Springfield to Largo — 27 stations
- [Orange Line](https://nextmetro.live/lines/orange/): Vienna to New Carrollton — 26 stations
- [Green Line](https://nextmetro.live/lines/green/): Branch Ave to Greenbelt — 21 stations
- [Yellow Line](https://nextmetro.live/lines/yellow/): Huntington to Mt Vernon Sq — 17 stations
- [Silver Line](https://nextmetro.live/lines/silver/): Ashburn to Largo — 34 stations

## Key Facts

- Covers all 98 stations on the WMATA Metrorail system
- Data sourced from the official WMATA Real-Time Rail API
- Built by Nick Poole
- Open source: https://github.com/nick-poole/nextmetro
- License: MIT
